heading: Implementation of Arctic research policy
label: 4106 Implementation of Arctic research policy
notes: Amendments2006—Subsec. (b)(2)(I) to (L). added subpar. (I) and redesignated former subpars. (I) to (K) as (J) to (L), respectively.Pub. L. 109–241

Designation of the National Science and Technology Council to Coordinate Certain Activities Under the Arctic Research and Policy Act of 1984Memorandum of President of the United States, , 75 F.R. 44063, provided:July 22, 2010Memorandum for the Director of the Office of Science and Technology PolicyBy the authority vested in me as President by the Constitution and the laws of the United States, including the Arctic Research and Policy Act of 1984 (Title I of ) (the “Act”), I hereby assign to the National Science and Technology Council (NSTC) responsibility to coordinate activities assigned in sections 107 and 108 of the Act to the Interagency Arctic Research Policy Committee, including through committees of the NSTC.Public Law 98–373The Director of the Office of Science and Technology Policy is authorized and directed to publish this memorandum in the Federal Register.Barack Obama.
amendments: Amendments2006—Subsec. (b)(2)(I) to (L). added subpar. (I) and redesignated former subpars. (I) to (K) as (J) to (L), respectively.Pub. L. 109–241

Designation of the National Science and Technology Council to Coordinate Certain Activities Under the Arctic Research and Policy Act of 1984Memorandum of President of the United States, , 75 F.R. 44063, provided:July 22, 2010Memorandum for the Director of the Office of Science and Technology PolicyBy the authority vested in me as President by the Constitution and the laws of the United States, including the Arctic Research and Policy Act of 1984 (Title I of ) (the “Act”), I hereby assign to the National Science and Technology Council (NSTC) responsibility to coordinate activities assigned in sections 107 and 108 of the Act to the Interagency Arctic Research Policy Committee, including through committees of the NSTC.Public Law 98–373The Director of the Office of Science and Technology Policy is authorized and directed to publish this memorandum in the Federal Register.Barack Obama.

children.heading: National Science Foundation and Director; functions
children.label: a National Science Foundation and Director; functions
children.text: The National Science Foundation is designated as the lead agency responsible for implementing Arctic research policy, and the Director of the National Science Foundation shall insure that the requirements of are fulfilled.section 4107 of this title

children.heading: Interagency Arctic Research Policy Committee; establishment; represented agencies; Chairperson
children.label: b Interagency Arctic Research Policy Committee; establishment; represented agencies; Chairperson

children.text: The President shall establish an Interagency Arctic Research Policy Committee (hereinafter referred to as the “Interagency Committee”).

children.label: H
children.text: the Department of Health and Human Services;

children.label: J
children.text: the National Aeronautics and Space Administration;

children.label: L
children.text: any other agency or office deemed appropriate.
The representative of the National Science Foundation shall serve as the Chairperson of the Interagency Committee.
